bug_report.summary: Assets Manager (Snippets): snippet list column is too narrow, causing excessive name truncation despite available space
steps_to_reproduce: Create a new snippet and rename it to a longer name (e.g., “Save Timing Test 01”).
Observe the snippet entry in the left snippet list.
expected_behaviors: The snippet list (SelectableList) should use available width appropriately (or be resizable) so snippet names are not excessively truncated when there is ample dialog space.
actual_behaviors: The snippet list column remains very narrow and the snippet name is truncated with an ellipsis (e.g., “Save-Timing-Test...”), even though there is significant unused horizontal space in the window.
